message:
fix(providers): propagate Context<'_> lifetime annotations and refine extension snapshot access patterns

Follow-up to the Cow-based Context refactor: concurrent agents have updated
all Provider trait implementations to use the explicit Context<'_> lifetime
annotation instead of bare &Context, ensuring the borrow checker correctly
tracks the relationship between the context's borrowed slices and the
provider's usage window.

**Provider lifetime fixes (all provider files):**
- Updated stream() method signatures: &Context → &Context<'_>
- Covers anthropic, azure, bedrock, cohere, copilot, gemini, gitlab,
  openai, openai_responses, vertex, and provider mod

**Extension system refinements (src/extensions.rs, src/extensions_js.rs):**
- Further snapshot access pattern improvements
- Minor formatting and logic adjustments from concurrent work

**Agent and compaction (src/agent.rs, src/compaction.rs, src/extension_tools.rs):**
- Agent test mock providers updated with Context<'_> lifetimes
- Compaction and extension_tools adjusted for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1945,7 +1945,7 @@ mod extensions_integration_tests {
 
         async fn stream(
             &self,
-            _context: &Context,
+            _context: &Context<'_>,
             _options: &StreamOptions,
         ) -> crate::error::Result<
             Pin<Box<dyn Stream<Item = crate::error::Result<StreamEvent>> + Send>>,
